Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is nothing more to do here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I go through this door,[n]I'll end up fighting my friends...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I go through this door, I'll end up[n]fighting Yukari-san and Mitsuru-san...[n]{f 1 1}
